what_it_does: A standalone 390x844 mobile HTML/CSS mockup of the 'right-hand man' (RHM) chat/presence surface: a voice-aware conversational UI with an animated presence orb, aurora background, gold/working-graded chat turns, an indicate chip, a propose-affordance consent card, record/debrief/thread dock, talk-to input bar, and bottom tab bar.
observations: Uses the real design tokens (hex palette) and Google Fonts link (Fraunces, IBM Plex Mono/Sans) from tokens.json, mirrored in CSS variables.
Renders a framed phone shell with rounded corners, shadow, and a hardware-like bezel.
Background layer has an animated aurora, dot grid, faint drifting 'ghost' node pills, and a noise grain overlay.
Presence stage centers a breathing orb with ripple rings and a listening emoji, plus a mode line 'auto-listen · deepseek-v4-pro'.
Chat log distinguishes 'you' (gold ◆) and 'vi' (working ◇) grades, with Fraunces used for vi bubbles.
Includes an 'indicate' chip showing a clicked addressed locus (ui://canvas/node/ask) with a clear action.
Includes a 'propose' consent card with approve/decline actions and a run target line.
Dock shows record (pulsing red dot), debrief, and thread chips.
Input bar has a glowing mic button representing auto-listen and a send button.
Bottom tab bar has Canvas, Inbox (await badge 3), RHM (active), and Run.
Comments explicitly map UI elements to real capabilities in RhmChat.tsx and Settings.tsx and label the file as an exploration lane, not a corpus addition.
standouts: The 'living instrument' direction: ambient aurora + breathing orb + light-based status instead of dense labels.
Gold vs working grade markers embedded directly in the conversation metadata.
The propose-affordance consent card inside the chat stream, with action only on approve.
Status-by-light pattern: presence dot, mic glow, await badge, record pulse.
conventions: Mirrors design tokens via CSS custom properties.
Uses data-ui-ref attributes to annotate UI affordances.
Includes a metadata comment block explaining target, source, direction, and no-fiction mapping.
Mobile-first fixed device frame with safe-area-like padding.
concerns: Static mockup: animations and states are hard-coded in CSS, not driven by real component state.
Some state is conveyed only by emoji (👂, ◆, ◇, ⌖) without textual or ARIA fallbacks.
Inline style attributes appear on a few elements (ghost colors, animation delays).
Color/token values are duplicated from tokens.json and could drift.
Comments claim real-code mappings that are not verifiable from this file alone.
notes: A polished, self-contained mobile RHM presence mockup that trades labels for ambient light, motion, and consent cards, with explicit anchors to real chat/voice settings capabilities.
questions: Does the orb always show auto-listen, or does it also represent push-to-talk?
What triggers the propose-affordance card to appear?
Is the Inbox badge count live or illustrative?
How are threads created, switched, and named?
Is the deepseek-v4-pro model pill a selectable config slot or just a label?
Are the ghost node pills interactive, or purely decorative background texture?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is an exploration mockup for a calm, voice-aware companion surface; the file delivers a static HTML/CSS prototype that demonstrates that visual direction and interaction patterns, matching its stated role as a mockup.
intention_signals: To elevate a flat developer panel into a calm, breathing conversational companion that the operator talks to rather than fills out, keeping the canvas visible behind and surfacing actions only through explicit consent.
novelty: The 'living instrument' treatment—aurora canvas backdrop, breathing presence orb, Fraunces voice typography, and a propose-affordance consent card integrated into a chat log—combined with explicit gold/working provenance grading.
contribution: Contributes a concrete visual and interaction vocabulary for a mobile RHM presence surface: orb/listening states, aurora canvas backdrop, gold/working message grading, indicate chip, propose-affordance card, record/debrief dock, and tab-bar await badge, which a fused system could keep as reference patterns.
summary_for_embedding: Standalone 390px mobile HTML/CSS mockup of a voice-aware 'right-hand man' chat interface with a breathing presence orb, aurora canvas backdrop, gold/working-graded conversation turns, indicate chip, propose-affordance consent card, record/debrief dock, and bottom tab bar.
intention_for_embedding: Explore a calm, living-instrument mobile presence surface where the operator talks to an entity rather than a form, using light and motion to convey state.
